name: trailblaze-sample-app-host-tools
description: Sample-app host-only tools. Identical author surface to the on-device-compatible flavor under ../quickjs-tools — same `@trailblaze/tools` import, same `trailblaze.tool(...)` registration shape. Host-only-ness comes from the handlers reaching for `node:fs` / `node:os`, NOT from importing a different SDK.
